title: [FIRRTL] infer width (cvt)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp89: SInt<11>
    tmp89 <= cvt(UInt("o1723"))
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: error: destination width 11 is not greater than or equal to source width 13
    tmp89 <= cvt(UInt("o1723"))
          ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp89, %0) : (!firrtl.sint<11>, !firrtl.sint<13>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [10:0] tmp89
);
  assign tmp89 = {1'b0,$signed(10'h3d3)};
endmodule
```
